overview: Dewan Realtors is a premium real estate platform with luxury 3D-styled design, property listings, dual-role authentication (employee/customer), employee dashboard with analytics, inquiry management, and advanced browsing features including comparison and recently viewed.
features: Property listings with grid, list, and map views
Image gallery uploads for each property
Property filtering by price, location, type, size, and facing direction
Employee dashboard with analytics cards and charts
Property bookmarking and saved listings for customers
Recently viewed properties and side-by-side comparison
Premium luxury design with 3D card effects and Framer Motion animations
